notes: I came in expecting either (a) a metaphysical claim dressed up as engineering wisdom or (b) generic 'stay calm under pressure' coaching content. Neither happened. The verse explicitly names its scope: 'this is an ontological claim, not an organisational one' and tags the engineering analog STRETCHED. The three-Mondays scenario is a real diagnostic — most engineers' work quality DOES oscillate with team-guṇa, and the proposed test (does the artifact-quality move with the surrounding org-state, or does it remain stable?) is checkable. The falsifiability handles the dissociation failure mode I would have raised ('a senior who claims to be unaffected but whose review quality drops when the team enters tamas has transcended nothing'). The diagnostic-in-artifacts-not-self-report move is the right level of skepticism for engineering judgment. PASS.
